user.title: Connect Home Assistant to Hermes Agent
user.description:
Home Assistant connects OUT to the Hermes Agent machine/container.

URL: enter the base URL for the Hermes host/container that Home Assistant can reach, for example http://hermes.local:7860 or http://192.168.1.20:7860. This is not your Home Assistant URL.

Token: enter the token Hermes expects for its API/WebSocket receiver. Use HERMES_HA_WS_TOKEN if you set it; otherwise use the Hermes API token from API_SERVER_KEY or HERMES_API_KEY. This is not a Home Assistant long-lived access token.

Route: Home Assistant connects → Hermes host/container URL → Hermes API/WebSocket receiver.

data.url: Hermes host/container URL (not your Home Assistant URL)
data.token: Hermes API/WebSocket token (not a Home Assistant token)

data_description.url: The base URL of the machine or container running Hermes Agent, e.g. http://hermes.local:7860. Home Assistant must be able to reach this address.
data_description.token: The bearer token expected by Hermes Agent: HERMES_HA_WS_TOKEN if set, otherwise API_SERVER_KEY or HERMES_API_KEY. Do not paste a Home Assistant long-lived access token here.

error.url_invalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
error.token_required: Hermes API / WebSocket token is required

data.entity_filter: Entity IDs to monitor (empty = all; one per line or comma-separated)

data.wake_word: Wake-word keyword(s) (one per line or comma-separated)
data.media_player_entity: Media player entity ID for TTS playback
